prerequisites.label: Agnes AI API Key (AGNES_AI_API_KEY)
prerequisites.satisfy: AGNES_AI_API_KEY is fleet-provisioned infrastructure (the same key backs the registered agnes/agnes-2.0-flash model on the boxes). This skill only REFERENCES it — verify SET/NOT-SET with `openclaw config get AGNES_AI_API_KEY` and NEVER print the value. If NOT-SET, escalate to the operator as an infrastructure gap; do not invent or substitute a key.
